title: Tithymalus helioscopius

This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other species within the family. The genus Tithymalus is a group of plants within the Euphorbiaceae family that are native to certain parts of the world. Tithymalus helioscopius is a specific species within this genus and family.
